items.title: 1 Reason I'm Never Selling Nvidia Stock
items.author: Rich Smith
items.description: Despite concerns about potential competition and margin compression, Nvidia remains a strong investment with robust AI chip demand, projected 44% annual earnings growth, and a fair valuation of 45 times trailing earnings.
